claim_boundary: mDG/mTG witness benchmark only. These values are not a source-side nuclear selector and must not be copied into a promotion-valid GA71_TD_SOURCE_CERTIFICATE.
nonclaims: mDG/mTG is a witness and benchmark, not a microscopic source-side transition density certificate.
The benchmark cannot be used as an upstream parent of rho_TD_71 or sigma_gs outputs.
A promotion-valid certificate requires a frozen source-side nuclear calculation with no gallium-rate target leakage.
